<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get counterparty exposure"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/credit/exposure/{counterpartyId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns current and potential future exposure for the specified counterparty.

  as={"h2"}
